# Skill: Defect Evidence and Ticketing

## Purpose
Standardize defect creation from failed automated runs.

## Required fields
- Story ID
- Test script ID
- Environment
- Actual result
- Expected result
- Repro steps
- Logs/screenshots links
- Severity recommendation

## Output
- Defect payload ready for Jira API or manual creation
- Deduplication key based on failure signature
